section_name: Failure to Carry or Present Vehicle License Receipt
chapter_title: Gen. Provisions Relating to Vehicle Size & Weight
text:
(a) A person commits an offense if the person fails in violation of Section 621.002 (Vehicle Registration Receipt for Certain Heavy Vehicles) to carry or present a vehicle registration receipt.

(b) An offense under this section is a misdemeanor punishable by a fine not to exceed $200.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 621. Gen. Provisions Relating to Vehicle Size & Weight
##### § 621.501 — Failure to Carry or Present Vehicle License Receipt

(a) A person commits an offense if the person fails in violation of Section 621.002 (Vehicle Registration Receipt for Certain Heavy Vehicles) to carry or present a vehicle registration receipt.

(b) An offense under this section is a misdemeanor punishable by a fine not to exceed $200.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: An offense under this section is a misdemeanor punishable by a fine not to exceed $200.
